scripts.build: npm run build -w @itharbors/plugin-types && npm run build -w @itharbors/sqlite-contracts && npm run build -w @itharbors/mysql-contracts && npm run build -w packages/client && npm run build -w packages/server && npm run plugins:build
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/server && npm run test -w packages/client && npm run test -w @itharbors/kit-sqlite && npm run test -w @itharbors/kit-mysql && npm run test -w @itharbors/kit-notifications && node --test scripts/lib/kit-path.test.mjs scripts/lib/ci-workflow.test.mjs scripts/lib/plugin-namespace.test.mjs scripts/lib/kit-catalog.test.mjs scripts/lib/workspace-store.test.mjs scripts/lib/electron-launcher.test.mjs scripts/lib/codex-skill-resource.test.mjs scripts/lib/notification-host.test.mjs scripts/lib/notification-desktop.test.mjs scripts/lib/plugin-build/scripts.test.mjs .agents/skills/notify-user/tests/notify.test.mjs && npm run test:change-workflow
scripts.kill: lsof -ti:8080 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti:5173 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; echo 'ports cleared'
scripts.check: npm run build && npm test && npm run plugins:check
